title: Manufacturing Engineer - Birla Tyres - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Birla Tyres - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Manufacturing Engineer looking for your next big career move? Birla Tyres in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Birla Tyres:
Birla Tyres is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Birla Tyres!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
